title: How to Get a Police Certificate – Lithuania - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate – Lithuania
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Teistumo (neteistumo) pažyma

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you live in Lithuania
Apply to the Information Technology and Communications Department (see Contact Information for complete address).

### If you live outside of Lithuania
Apply at your nearest Lithuanian embassy or consulate.
- Application form (PDF, 178.88 KB) (in Lithuanian only)
- Identification document (e.g. Passport or ID card)
Information Technology and Communications Department Ministry of Interior of the Republic of Lithuania Sventaragio str. 2 LT-2600 Vilnius Lithuania Telephone: (+370 5) Fax: (+370 5)2718921
